Operation 'listLanguages' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added explanation of what is returned (array of Language objects with structure), and provided context for when an AI agent would use this operation (language discovery before compiler queries).

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all programming languages supported by Compiler Explorer. Returns an array of Language objects, each containing the language identifier and name. Use this operation to discover available languages before querying compilers or tools.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added explanation of what is returned (array of Language objects with structure), and provided context for when an AI agent would use this operation (language discovery before compiler queries).

message: Operation 'listCompilers' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is adequate but description is missing. Added details about the optional filter parameter, the structure of returned Compiler objects, and the use case for AI agents. This helps agents understand when to use this versus language-specific compiler queries.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all available compilers across all languages. Accepts an optional filter parameter to narrow results. Returns an array of Compiler objects containing compiler identifier, name, version, language, and configuration details. Use this to discover available compilation targets.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is missing. Added details about the optional filter parameter, the structure of returned Compiler objects, and the use case for AI agents. This helps agents understand when to use this versus language-specific compiler queries.

message: Operation 'listCompilersByLanguage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. data.current_summary: List compilers for a specific language
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all compilers available for a specified programming language. Requires the languageId path parameter to identify the target language. Returns an array of Compiler objects with details including compiler name, version, and supported options. Use this after identifying a language to find appropriate compilation targets.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. Added explanation of required languageId parameter, structure of returned Compiler objects, and the typical workflow (language selection followed by compiler selection) to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_summary: List libraries available for a language
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all libraries available for a specified programming language. Requires the languageId path parameter. Returns an array of Library objects containing library identifier and name. Use this to discover linkable libraries before compilation.

data.current_summary: List tools available for a language
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all tools available for a specified programming language. Requires the languageId path parameter. Returns an array of Tool objects containing tool identifier, name, type, and execution details. Tools may include formatters, analyzers, or other code processing utilities.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. Added explanation of the required languageId parameter, structure of returned Tool objects, and examples of tool types to help AI agents understand the scope and purpose of this operation.

data.current_summary: Get information about a short link
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves information about a Compiler Explorer short link. Requires the linkId path parameter identifying the short link. Returns a ShortLinkInfo object containing the expanded link data and associated compilation or code sharing information. Use this to resolve short links to their full content.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. Added explanation of the required linkId parameter, structure of returned ShortLinkInfo object, and the use case (resolving short links) to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Compiles source code using a specified compiler. Requires the compilerId path parameter and a CompilationRequest body containing source code, compiler options, and libraries. Returns a CompilationResult object with generated assembly, compilation output, and diagnostics. Side effects: compilation is executed server-side and may consume resources.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing critical details. Added explanation of required compilerId parameter, CompilationRequest structure (source code, options, libraries), returned CompilationResult contents (assembly, output, diagnostics), and side effects (server-side execution and resource consumption). This enables AI agents to understand the operation's full scope and implications.

data.summary_suggestion: Compile C/C++ code using CMake build system
data.description_suggestion: Compiles source code using the specified compiler with CMake build system configuration.
